nasb.text: Now in the second year of the reign of Nebuchadnezzar, Nebuchadnezzar had dreams; and his spirit was troubled and his sleep left him.

esv.text: In the second year of the reign of Nebuchadnezzar, Nebuchadnezzar had dreams; his spirit was troubled, and his sleep left him.

cnv.text: 尼布甲尼撒在位第二年，他作了夢，因此心裡煩亂，不能入睡。

ccb.text: 尼布甲尼撒在执政第二年做了梦，心里烦乱，无法入睡，
